title: 针对三九、白云山、云南白药、片仔癀等企业，查询2... - 营业总收入

meta.source_sql:
WITH company_data AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_abbr,
        report_period,
        report_year,
        total_operating_revenue,
        LAG(total_operating_revenue, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_abbr ORDER BY report_year) AS prev_year_revenue
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE stock_abbr IN ('华润三九', '白云山', '云南白药', '片仔癀')
        AND report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3')
),
industry_data AS (
    SELECT 
        '行业整体' AS stock_abbr,
        report_period,
        report_year,
        AVG(total_operating_revenue) AS total_operating_revenue,
        LAG(AVG(total_operating_revenue), 1) OVER (ORDER BY report_year) AS prev_year_revenue
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3')
    GROUP BY report_period, report_year
),
combined_data AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_abbr,
        report_period,
        report_year,
        total_operating_revenue,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_year_revenue IS NULL OR prev_year_revenue = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND((total_operating_revenue - prev_year_revenue) * 100.0 / prev_year_revenue, 2)
        END AS yoy_growth_rate
    FROM company_data
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        stock_abbr,
        report_period,
        report_year,
        total_operating_revenue,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_year_revenue IS NULL OR prev_year_revenue = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND((total_operating_revenue - prev_year_revenue) * 100.0 / prev_year_revenue, 2)
        END AS yoy_growth_rate
    FROM industry_data
)
SELECT 
    stock_abbr,
    report_period,
    report_year,
    total_operating_revenue,
    yoy_growth_rate
FROM combined_data
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN stock_abbr = '行业整体' THEN 2
        ELSE 1
    END,
    stock_abbr,
    report_year;
